'''Comet Motors''' was a company that designed and manufactured [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]]. They supplied the engines used aboard [[Mobquet Swoops and Speeders/Legends|Mobquet Swoops and Speeders]]' [[Wandering Flyer 191]].<ref name="HSCS" />
